---
title: "Open and Image"
author: "Fabricio Lennart"
date: today
jupyter: python3
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Overview

First of all is important to understand that and image is just pixels and for reading it we need to install de following libraries.

```{python}
from PIL import Image, ImageEnhance
import pytesseract
```


# Load the data 

```{python}
product_1 = "../data/meli_product_0.png"

im = Image.open(product_1)
im.show()
```

# Data processing

In order to have the text more clear we need to convert them into grayscale and also add some contrasat

```{python}
img = im.convert("L")

enh = ImageEnhance.Contrast(img)
new_img = enh.enhance(1.5)

new_img.show()
```
